content:
📊 **AI 科研日报** — 2026年05月28日 周四
> 🔥 Agent工具 + 🚀 推理加速 + 💻 本地部署

## 🔥 GitHub 开源项目精选
1. [UditAkhourii/adhd](https://github.com/UditAkhourii/adhd)
   ADHD — a skill for coding agents. Tree-of-thought with pruning, built on the Cla | ⭐344
2. [realrossmanngroup/no_ai_slop_writing_rules](https://github.com/realrossmanngroup/no_ai_slop_writing_rules)
   Claude Code reference: write in Louis Rossmann's voice, never like AI slop. Port | ⭐240
3. [bandyah/uni-mm-trainer](https://github.com/bandyah/uni-mm-trainer)
   A small library for training multimodal LLMs combining text, vision, and audio | ⭐162
4. [cclank/lanshu-awesome-ai-video-kit](https://github.com/cclank/lanshu-awesome-ai-video-kit)
   做企业 AI 视频项目逼出来的工具包 · 411 prompt · 15 模型 · 7 Claude Skill · 14 篇方法论 | ⭐157
5. [quarqlabs/agent-oss](https://github.com/quarqlabs/agent-oss)
   A recursive evidence-gated cognitive runtime for memory-native AI agents, combin | ⭐138
6. [cellinlab/how-pi-agent-works](https://github.com/cellinlab/how-pi-agent-works)
   Pi Agent 原理与实现 | ⭐136
7. [Bhojendra-dev/LSFG-Desktop](https://github.com/Bhojendra-dev/LSFG-Desktop)
   lossless scaling steam desck download github reddit android lsfg 3 frame generat | ⭐133
8. [JasonLam08/cursor_agent_status_light](https://github.com/JasonLam08/cursor_agent_status_light)
   A BLE-powered status light for Cursor Agent, using ESP32-C3 to visualize AI codi | ⭐131

- Agent + 工具调用持续火热
- 推理效率优化成为焦点
- 多模态模型进展迅速
- 本地部署需求增长
